chapter.summary: Source text for Psalms 131 in Brenton's English Septuagint.

verses.text: A Song of Degrees. - O Lord, my heart is not exalted, neither have mine eyes been haughtily raised: neither have I exercised myself in great matters, nor in things too wonderful for me.
I shall have sinned if I have not been humble, but have exulted my soul: according to the relation of a weaned child to his mother, so wilt thou recompense my soul.
Let Israel hope in the Lord, from henceforth and for ever.
